zh.lifeSummary: Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe是Eberhard van de Betuwe-Teisterbant的女兒，於大約1023年出生在比利時布拉班特洛文。她於1062年與Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel在法國洛萊姆斯布拉班吉素-斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1086年在法國洛萊姆斯布拉班吉素-斯享年65歲，埋葬在法國洛萊姆斯布拉班吉素-斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe是Eberhard van de Betuwe-Teisterbant的女儿，于大约1023年出生在比利时布拉班特洛文。她于1062年与Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel在法国洛萊姆斯布拉班吉素-斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1086年在法国洛萊姆斯布拉班吉素-斯享年65岁，埋葬在法国洛萊姆斯布拉班吉素-斯。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: en
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian (Øen): habitational name from the farm name Øen, found in several places. In Hornindal in Nordfjord and in Ål in Hallingdal it is from øy ‘meadow by water’, in Hyllestad in Sunnfjord from å ‘small river’ + Old Norse vin ‘meadow’, in other places from the definite singular form of øy ‘island’.
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Oen in Hordaland, from Old Norse Ó, unexplained.

variants.name: Wen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Chi, Han, Cheng, Jin, Li, Yen, Yong, Chen, Chih-Hung, Chin, Hong, Jian, Jung, Long, Huan, Hung, Hung Chi, Ly, Quan.

Mandarin form of the surname 溫, meaning ‘warm’ in Chinese: (i) from Wen (溫), the name of an ancient state during the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ). During the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) this state was annexed by the state of Di and the prince of Wen fled to the state of Wey (located around present-day Hebi and Xinxiang in Henan province). His descendants acquired 溫, the name of their original state, as their surname. (ii) from the placename Wen (溫), the name of a fief granted to Wen Ji (溫季), an official in the state of Jin (located mainly in present-day Shanxi province) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iii) from the Chi Wen (叱溫), Wen Pen (溫盆), and Wen Gu (溫孤) families of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iv) from the personal name of Wen Sheng (溫昇), who went into exile and changed his original surname, Liu (劉), to Wen 溫 after his father, Liu Yicong (劉易從), an official in the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ), suffered persecution and death.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

meanings: form of   Adele  , especially popular in the late 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe was born about 1023, in Leuven, Brabant, Belgium as the daughter of Eberhard van de Betuwe-Teisterbant. She married Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel in 1062, in Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1086, in Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, France, at the age of 65, and was buried in Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe est née environ 1023, à Leuven, Brabant, Belgique, fille d’Eberhard van de Betuwe-Teisterbant. Elle a épousé Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel en 1062, à Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1086, à Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe wurde um 1023 in Leuven, Brabant, Belgien, als Tochter von Eberhard van de Betuwe-Teisterbant geboren. Sie hat 1062 in Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1086 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich und wurde in Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe è nata il circa 1023 nel Leuven, Brabante, Belgio come figlia di Eberhard van de Betuwe-Teisterbant. Lei sposato Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel nel 1062, nel Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1086, nel Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuweは約1023年にベルギーブラバントレウベンでEberhard van de Betuwe-Teisterbantの娘として生まれた。1062年にフランスロレィヌメウゼブラバント-スル-メウゼでHendrik II van Leuven-Brusselと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1086年にフランスロレィヌメウゼブラバント-スル-メウゼで65歳で死去し，フランスロレィヌメウゼブラバント-スル-メウゼにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe(은)는 대략 1023년 벨기에 브라반트 레우븐에서 Eberhard van de Betuwe-Teisterbant의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1062년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 브라반트-수-우스에서 Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1086년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 브라반트-수-우스에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 로레이인 우스 브라반트-수-우스에 묻혔다.

mg.um 1023–um 1086: tany ho any amin'ny 1023–tany ho any amin'ny 1086

pt.lifeSummary: Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe nasceu aproximadamente 1023, em Leuven, Brabante, Bélgica filha de Eberhard van de Betuwe-Teisterbant. Ela casou-se com Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel em 1062, em Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1086, em Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, França, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe родилась около 1023 г. в местности леувен, брабант, Бельгия. Её отца звали Eberhard van de Betuwe-Teisterbant. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel в 1062 г. в местности брабант-сур-меус, меус, лорреаин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1086 г. в местности брабант-сур-меус, меус, лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности брабант-сур-меус, меус, лорреаин, Франция.

sm.um 1023–um 1086: e tusa o le 1023–e tusa o le 1086

es.lifeSummary: Adela van Teisterbant en de Betuwe nació aproximadamente 1023, en Leuven, Brabante, Bélgica como hija de Eberhard van de Betuwe-Teisterbant. Se casó con Hendrik II van Leuven-Brussel en 1062, en Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1086, en Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia.
